title: roldana cristobalensis
intro: Roldana cristobalensis, also known as Mexican mint or mountain mint, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Roldana cristobalensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Roldana cristobalensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
